definitions: Tiny blood vessels that surround the proximal and distal tubules of the nephron in the kidney.
They are involved in reabsorption and secretion between the blood and the renal tubule.
examples: The peritubular capillaries play a crucial role in kidney function.
Substances are exchanged between the renal tubules and the peritubular capillaries.
Damage to the peritubular capillaries can impair kidney filtration.
